name: 仙界宿命姻緣
description: 男女主在仙界即有宿命聯繫，下凡歷劫是為了完成情劫。這種『前世註定』的設定讓愛情超越凡間邏輯，增加浪漫感和史詩感。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Your Highness's love tribulation is me / Xixi, would you like to marry me? / For the next hundred or thousand years / Even ten thousand years / I will treat you well.
examples.context: 男女主在仙界即有宿命聯繫，下凡歷劫是為了完成情劫。這種『前世註定』的設定讓愛情超越凡間邏輯，增加浪漫感和史詩感。
